message: Web UI tweaks: real-link results, URL-persisted query + localStorage recent-search dropdown, markdown-it message rendering, user/assistant coloured boxes, opencode in tagline, leaner result rows (id/filename only on session page), sticky session header.

Capture per-session working directory from log content (adapter.extractCwd for claude/codex/pi; opencode session.directory) into source_files.cwd; resolve per session via chunks join; one-time backfillCwd at startup for pre-existing data; session API returns it home-relative. Filename-decoding was rejected: lossy (slashes->dashes, ambiguous for dashed dirs like agent-search) and absent for codex/opencode. Title bar shows session id + copy and working dir + copy-log-path.

Copy buttons fall back to hidden-textarea execCommand('copy') when navigator.clipboard is absent, so copy works on insecure http:// origins (not just https/localhost). New web/src/lib/clipboard.ts copyText helper.
